assertionResults.fullName: createReplyDispatcher drops empty payloads and silent tokens without media
assertionResults.title: drops empty payloads and silent tokens without media

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyDispatcher strips heartbeat tokens and applies responsePrefix
assertionResults.title: strips heartbeat tokens and applies responsePrefix

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyDispatcher avoids double-prefixing and keeps media when heartbeat is the only text
assertionResults.title: avoids double-prefixing and keeps media when heartbeat is the only text

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyDispatcher preserves ordering across tool, block, and final replies
assertionResults.title: preserves ordering across tool, block, and final replies

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyDispatcher fires onIdle when the queue drains
assertionResults.title: fires onIdle when the queue drains

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyDispatcher delays block replies after the first when humanDelay is natural
assertionResults.title: delays block replies after the first when humanDelay is natural

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyDispatcher uses custom bounds for humanDelay and clamps when max <= min
assertionResults.title: uses custom bounds for humanDelay and clamps when max <= min

assertionResults.fullName: resolveReplyToMode defaults to off for Telegram
assertionResults.title: defaults to off for Telegram

assertionResults.fullName: resolveReplyToMode defaults to off for Discord and Slack
assertionResults.title: defaults to off for Discord and Slack

assertionResults.fullName: resolveReplyToMode defaults to all when channel is unknown
assertionResults.title: defaults to all when channel is unknown

assertionResults.fullName: resolveReplyToMode uses configured value when present
assertionResults.title: uses configured value when present

assertionResults.fullName: resolveReplyToMode uses chat-type replyToMode overrides for Slack when configured
assertionResults.title: uses chat-type replyToMode overrides for Slack when configured

assertionResults.fullName: resolveReplyToMode falls back to top-level replyToMode when no chat-type override is set
assertionResults.title: falls back to top-level replyToMode when no chat-type override is set

assertionResults.fullName: resolveReplyToMode uses legacy dm.replyToMode for direct messages when no chat-type override exists
assertionResults.title: uses legacy dm.replyToMode for direct messages when no chat-type override exists

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyToModeFilter drops replyToId when mode is off
assertionResults.title: drops replyToId when mode is off

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyToModeFilter keeps replyToId when mode is off and reply tags are allowed
assertionResults.title: keeps replyToId when mode is off and reply tags are allowed

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyToModeFilter keeps replyToId when mode is all
assertionResults.title: keeps replyToId when mode is all

assertionResults.fullName: createReplyToModeFilter keeps only the first replyToId when mode is first
assertionResults.title: keeps only the first replyToId when mode is first
